audit_items.boundary_note: Contribution wording stays limited to governance and boundaries.
audit_items.expected: governance pipeline and claim boundaries, not validation or readiness
audit_items.observed: This work establishes an internally audited, safety-bounded, safe abstract toy-only governance pipeline for organizing manuscript patch decisions and claim boundaries. The pipeline operates only on synthetic, abstract, unitless, non-operational toy artifacts. The staged artifact lineage includes proposal, dry-run, structural gate, plan, checklist, audit, decision ledger, finding register, consistency audit, and claim boundary registration. Internal counters preserve zero application permission, zero applied patches, zero manuscript mutation, zero readiness approval, and zero real-biological operational capability. The claim boundary register separates currently allowed manuscript wording from deferred and prohibited claims. The current evidence base does not establish external validation, independent experimental support, proof assistant verification, citation-completed claims, or manuscript submission readiness. The framework does not model real pathogens, real receptors, operational host targeting, infectivity optimization, immune evasion, or host-range prediction. Future work must separately audit any safe manuscript patch application, citation integration, toy evaluation, proof pathway, or submission readiness upgrade before stronger claims are introduced.
